spec_reference: 提示词/mrna的 rl 的后续优化的分阶段提示词.md#L1732-1745

constraints: position must be within 5'UTR (0 <= pos < len(five_utr))
nucleotide must be one of A/C/G/U
identity substitution (same nucleotide) is excluded from legal set

CDS_SYNONYMOUS_SUB.description: Atomic synonymous codon substitution in CDS
constraints: codon_position must be within CDS (0 <= codon_pos < n_codons)
target_codon must not be START_CODON (AUG) unless current is AUG
target_codon must not be a STOP_CODON
codon_position must not be the first codon (start codon preserved)
codon_position must not be the last codon (stop codon preserved)

INDEL.reason: Primary task excludes indels; would change transcript length

CDS_NONSYNONYMOUS_SUB.description: Single-nucleotide CDS substitution that changes amino acid
CDS_NONSYNONYMOUS_SUB.reason: Would violate protein identity hard constraint

CDS_SINGLE_NT_SUB.reason: Creates nonsynonymous intermediate states; atomic codon swap required

THREE_UTR_SUB.reason: 3'UTR is locked_extension in primary task (P3-00); not editable

existing_action_space_issues.issue: Action(op, pos, nt) is nucleotide-level; CDS synonymous codon swap requiring >1 nt change costs multiple edit-budget steps and creates nonsynonymous intermediates
existing_action_space_issues.fix: P3-06 introduces CDS_SYNONYMOUS_SUB as an atomic codon-level action

existing_action_space_issues.issue: build_legal_action_mask includes ins/del actions (indels) which are forbidden in primary task
3'UTR is editable in existing action space but should be locked in primary task

protein_identity_100_percent.how: CDS_SYNONYMOUS_SUB guarantees protein preservation by construction
protein_identity_100_percent.verification: test: translate(source.cds) == translate(candidate.cds) for all legal CDS actions

transcript_length_100_percent_unchanged.how: No indels in action space; all actions preserve length
transcript_length_100_percent_unchanged.verification: test: len(source.seq) == len(candidate.seq) for all legal actions

no_single_nt_cds_nonsynonymous_intermedi.how: CDS_SYNONYMOUS_SUB is atomic (replaces entire codon, not single nt)
no_single_nt_cds_nonsynonymous_intermedi.verification: test: no intermediate state with partial codon change

t7_primary_trajectory_can_select_5utr_cd.how: Hierarchical policy level 2 allows region switching across steps
t7_primary_trajectory_can_select_5utr_cd.verification: test: trajectory can alternate between 5'UTR and CDS edits
